title: Live-updatable Pod idle timeout (no recreate)
description: Idle timeout is baked into the Pod env (CUBRIC_IDLE_TIMEOUT_S) at create time only; changing it + reconnecting a warm/stopped Pod silently keeps the OLD value (warm resume ignores it, env is immutable on a live Pod). User WILL change the timeout expecting it respected. Fix = wrapper live-update endpoint, NOT force-recreate (recreate makes the user wait for an image pull just to change a number). Wrapper: make IDLE_TIMEOUT_S a mutable Watchdog field, add authed POST /wrapper/idle-timeout {seconds} that clamps + recomputes deadline live, surface current timeout_s in /health. App: POST /proxy/idle-timeout forward, unlock the Settings input while connected + push on-change live + toast, read live value back from /health, rewrite the hint. New image build (cu124/cu128/cpu matrix) + WRAPPER_VERSION bump. Also carries the F8 crash-watchdog live-verify (moved from MPI-93): on the NEW image confirm the watchdog self-stops at the configured value AND honors a live update. Wrapper + app + rebuild.
